\begin{itemize}
Cheng, S., Jiang, Y., Zhou, Z., Liu, D., Tao, W., Zhang, L., ... & Zhou, B. (2025). SDAR-VL: Stable and Efficient Block-wise Diffusion for Vision-Language Understanding. arXiv preprint arXiv:2512.14068.
Cheng, S., Bian, Y., Liu, D., Zhang, L., Yao, Q., Tian, Z., ... & Zhou, B. (2025). Sdar: A synergistic diffusion-autoregression paradigm for scalable sequence generation. arXiv preprint arXiv:2510.06303.
\item \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.17245}{Du, W.$^{*}$, Cheng, S.$^{*}$, Luo, T., Qiu, Z., Huang, Z., Cheung, K. C., Cheng, R.$^{\dagger}$, Fu, J$^{\dagger}$. (2024) `Unlocking Continual Learning Abilities in Language Models.' in 2024 EMNLP findings.}\\
\item Cheng, S.$^{*}$, Ma, Z.$^{*}$, and Ye, J$^{\dagger}$. (2024) `A Benchmark of Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Task-Oriented Dialogue Based on Adversarial Contrastive Representation Learning', in 2024 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo, ICME 2024. \\
\item \href{https://papers.bmvc2023.org/0460.pdf}{Cheng, S. and Ye, J$^{\dagger}$. (2023) `AMA: Adaptive Memory Augmentation for Enhancing Image Captioning.' in 34th British Machine Vision Conference 2023, BMVC 2023.}\\
\item \href{https://iclr.cc/virtual/2025/poster/28923}{Qiu, Z., Huang, Z., Cheng, S., Zhou, Y., Wang, Z., Titov, I., & Fu, J. (2024). Layerwise recurrent router for mixture-of-experts. in the Thirteenth International Conference on Learning Representations, ICLR 2025.}\\
\item \href{https://aclanthology.org/2023.dialdoc-1.5/}{Liu, J.$^{*}$, Cheng, S.$^{*}$, Zhou, Z.$^{*}$, Gu, Y., Ye, J., & Luo, H. (2023, July). `Enhancing Multilingual Document-Grounded Dialogue Using Cascaded Prompt-Based Post-Training Models.' Proceedings of the Third DialDoc Workshop on Document-grounded Dialogue and Conversational Question Answering, ACL Workshop-2023.}\\
\end{itemize}
  
返回给我统一的格式
